name: Frosted Christmas Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Line a 12-inch pizza pan with aluminum foil.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together melted margarine, sugar, and vanilla extract. Add eggs and beat well with a spoon.
4. Combine flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt in another bowl. Gradually add to the egg mixture, stirring until well blended.
5. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched in the center. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
7. Once cooled, trim off any edges that may have gone over the sides of the pan. If desired, remove brownie from the pan and peel off the foil (or serve in the pan).
8. Spread frosting evenly over the top.
9. Draw holly leaves on the frosted brownie and place red candies in their proper positions to resemble holly berries.
